title: Patient Records Flow
description: Regression coverage for encrypted record creation, storage, and retrieval surfaces.

tests.title: Patient records list page shows deterministic records without rendering failures.
tests.description: This test ensures that the records index page can load and display expected deterministic fixtures. It catches state hydration and query wiring bugs in records presentation.
preconditions: a deterministic patient record fixture exists
steps: Wait for records list query to settle
Verify at least one deterministic row or empty-state placeholder is visible
tests.successCriteria: The records page renders and no unhandled exception occurs during list loading.

tests.title: Encrypted record save API accepts valid deterministic payloads.
tests.description: This test validates the encryption-save API contract used by the record creation flow. It fails if payload validation drifts or backend dependencies break.
steps: Capture response body and status code
Assert response shape includes persisted reference or explicit validation reason
tests.successCriteria: Request does not produce 500 and response contract matches expected shape.

tests.title: IPFS upload and fetch routes can roundtrip deterministic content references.
tests.description: This test verifies that upload and fetch endpoints are aligned and usable in one flow. It catches shape mismatches and transport errors that break record retrieval.
preconditions: IPFS routes are available in frontend API
deterministic encrypted content fixture is available
tests.successCriteria: Both upload and fetch complete without HTTP 500 and fetch returns retrievable payload data.
